scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5073 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5073 node scripts/run-electron.js
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm check:architecture && pnpm format:check
scripts.dist:mac:x64: node scripts/guard-dist-mac-env.js x64 && pnpm prepack:electron && cross-env CLI_TARGET_PLATFORM=darwin CLI_TARGET_ARCH=x64 pnpm prepare:cli-runtime && pnpm build && electron-builder --mac --x64 --config electron-builder.json
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: node scripts/guard-dist-mac-env.js arm64 && pnpm prepack:electron && cross-env CLI_TARGET_PLATFORM=darwin CLI_TARGET_ARCH=arm64 pnpm prepare:cli-runtime && pnpm build && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --config electron-builder.json
scripts.dist:win: node scripts/guard-dist-win-env.js x64 && pnpm prepack:electron && cross-env CLI_TARGET_PLATFORM=win32 CLI_TARGET_ARCH=x64 pnpm prepare:cli-runtime && pnpm build && electron-builder --win --x64 --config electron-builder.json
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/clean-e2e-artifacts.js && pnpm prepare:cli-runtime && pnpm build && node scripts/ensure-e2e-providers-ready.js && cross-env APP_E2E_SHOW_WINDOW=0 playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:headed: node scripts/clean-e2e-artifacts.js && pnpm prepare:cli-runtime && pnpm build && node scripts/ensure-e2e-providers-ready.js && cross-env APP_E2E_SHOW_WINDOW=1 playwright test
